implementation.verification_output: npx tsc --noEmit completed with no errors

improvements_made: Ported InstaFlow pattern exactly: readFile → base64 → generateText with image+text content
mimeType detection covers .png, .webp, and fallback to image/jpeg (InstaFlow only had png/jpeg)

Accepts createModel and modelo as params — never imports providers directly

implementation.verification_output: npx tsc --noEmit completed with no errors

improvements_made: Used parameterized IN clause ($1, $2, ...) instead of ANY($1) for PGlite compatibility
path.isAbsolute() check before joining with getDataDir()/imagens/ to handle both relative and absolute paths
Read images inside the loop (not pre-loaded) via analisarProdutoImagem to avoid memory bloat
200ms delay skipped on last item (i < itens.length - 1) to avoid unnecessary wait at the end
broadcastToRenderer called both on success (with resultado) and error (with erro) for consistent frontend updates
